calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Cole for Ana Lau.

Mr. Cole explained how title was held (Tenants in Common/Joint Tenants), the transactions that occurred with regard to change in title, and the percentage owned by the Estate. The Court informed Mr. Cole that it had concluded that the Estate owns 12.5% interest in the property. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Cole for Ana Lau.

Mr. Cole explained that the Hartford property is owned by the Decedent's two Children, that it was deeded back for refinancing purposes and that they will deed the property back by way of an affidavit of death. Mr. Cole also stated that the Petitioner always believed that the two properties (San Francisco and Daly City) were community property, and that the San Jose Avenue property is the Decedent's separate property and will need to be probated. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
